topic: Cách dạy con không la mắng khi trẻ mắc lỗi
main_title: CÁCH XỬ LÝ KHI CON MẮC LỖI: SAI vs ĐÚNG
subtitle: Phương pháp kỷ luật tích cực giúp con phát triển lành mạnh

left_side.description: A frustrated parent standing over a small child, yelling with an angry red face, pointing finger accusingly. The child is cowering, crying with hands covering ears. The room is dark and tense. Parent's body language is aggressive and intimidating. Child looks scared and defensive, shrinking away from the parent.
left_side.label: SAI

right_side.description: A calm parent kneeling down to child's eye level, speaking gently with soft facial expression. The child is listening attentively. The room is bright and peaceful. Parent's body language is open and welcoming. Both are making eye contact, child looks secure and understood.
right_side.text: Bình tĩnh, nói chuyện nhẹ nhàng
right_side.label: ĐÚNG

left_side.description: Parent grabbing child's toy and throwing it in trash while child watches in distress. Parent has stern, punitive expression. Child is reaching out desperately for the toy, tears streaming down face. The scene shows harsh punishment without explanation.
left_side.text: Phạt nặng, tịch thu đồ chơi
left_side.label: SAI

right_side.description: Parent and child sitting together, discussing consequences. Parent holds toy gently while explaining. Child is nodding in understanding. There's a timer on table showing temporary timeout. Both have calm expressions, working together on solution.
right_side.text: Giải thích hậu quả, thỏa thuận
right_side.label: ĐÚNG

left_side.description: Parent comparing crying child to a smiling sibling, pointing between them disapprovingly. The criticized child looks ashamed and hurt. The favored sibling looks uncomfortable. Parent's expression is judgmental and dismissive.
left_side.label: SAI

right_side.description: Parent focusing only on the child who made mistake, having one-on-one conversation. Parent acknowledges child's unique qualities while addressing behavior. Child feels heard and valued. No comparison or judgment in parent's approach.
right_side.text: Tập trung vào hành vi cụ thể
right_side.label: ĐÚNG

left_side.description: Parent ignoring child who is trying to explain their side of story. Parent has arms crossed, looking away dismissively. Child is gesturing frantically, trying to communicate but being shut down. No dialogue happening.
left_side.label: SAI

right_side.description: Parent actively listening to child's explanation, making eye contact, nodding. Child is speaking freely without fear. Parent has open body language, showing patience. Both are engaged in meaningful dialogue about what happened.
right_side.label: ĐÚNG

left_side.description: Parent sending child alone to dark corner for punishment, child standing facing wall crying. Parent walks away without explanation. Child looks confused and abandoned. No learning or understanding taking place.
left_side.label: SAI

right_side.description: Parent and child working together on making amends - cleaning up mess or writing apology note. Both are actively participating in resolution. Child is learning through action. Parent guides with patience and encouragement.
right_side.text: Cùng con sửa chữa lỗi lầm
right_side.label: ĐÚNG
